== Eat ==
* {{eat
| name=Quán Mì Quảng Thật
| address=12 Đường Mẫu, Hải Châu
| lat=16.0544
| long=108.2022
| phone=+84 236 123 456
| hours=06:00-21:00
| price=40,000-60,000 VND
| lastedit=2026-07-01
| content=This prose must never be copied into the enrichment overlay.
}}

== Sleep ==
* {{sleep
| name=Khách sạn Biển Mẫu
| address=99 Võ Nguyên Giáp
| lat=16.0611
| long=108.2277
| url=https://example.org/hotel
| price=US$10 (Jan 2018)
| lastedit=2018-01-31
| content=Old prose and old prices must not become current facts.
}}
